subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath spoken the truth and summoned all creation unto the Most Exalted Horizon, the Station wherein utterance floweth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نطق بالحق و دعا الخلق الی الافق الاعلی المقام الذی فیه تنطق
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @wisdom [hikmat], @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice
